target_notes: Kenya total fertility rate 15-49 across all DHS surveys 1989-present. The TFR indicator (FE_FRTR_W_TFR per DHS Standard Indicator List) measures children per woman. Kenya's first DHS in 1989 reported TFR=6.7 (a widely cited fertility benchmark; subsequent surveys document Kenya's fertility transition). Captured the indicator data + country metadata + survey list + indicator metadata from api.dhsprogram.com (no auth required for read access).
capture_method: GET 4 endpoints from api.dhsprogram.com: /data (TFR values across surveys), /countries (Kenya metadata with ISO/UN codes), /surveys (9 Kenya DHS survey records since 1989), /indicators (TFR indicator definition). All public no-auth, ~14 KB total.
